mapper.insert: INSERT INTO external_call ( call_id, call_idempotency_key, compensation_type, compensation_target_call_id, payment_instruction_id, parent_call_id, session_id, user_id, call_type, target_system, endpoint_url, http_method, request_id, request_header, request_body, request_body_hash, response_status_code, response_header, response_body, business_response_code, response_message, result, attempt_no, requested_at, responded_at, response_time_ms, timeout_ms, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{callId}, #{callIdempotencyKey}, #{compensationType}, #{compensationTargetCallId}, #{paymentInstructionId}, #{parentCallId}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{callType}, #{targetSystem}, #{endpointUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{requestId}, #{requestHeader}::jsonb, #{requestBody}::jsonb, #{requestBodyHash}, #{responseStatusCode}, #{responseHeader}::jsonb, #{responseBody}::jsonb, #{businessResponseCode}, #{responseMessage}, #{result}, #{attemptNo}, #{requestedAt}, #{respondedAt}, #{responseTimeMs}, #{timeoutMs}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE external_call SET response_status_code = #{responseStatusCode}, response_header = #{responseHeader}::jsonb, response_body = #{responseBody}::jsonb, business_response_code = #{businessResponseCode}, response_message = #{responseMessage}, result = #{result}, response_time_ms = #{responseTimeMs}, responded_at = #{respondedAt}, last_modified_at = now() WHERE call_id = #{callId}
